title: Exec Metrics Copilot
summary: Turn KPI changes into plain-language executive summaries with linked operational context.

sample_features.query: Summarize the highest priority risk and recommended next step.

knowledge_base: Exec Metrics Copilot is positioned as a Executive Analytics starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Turn KPI changes into plain-language executive summaries with linked operational context.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on executive, summaries, analytics.
